dns_name.description: Specifies the DNS name to which this rule applies; must be a valid DNS name.

local_data.description: Specifies the local data for the DNS response policy rule, including DNS resource records. Must be formatted as valid DNS resource record strings.
local_data.type: list(object({local_datas: list(object({name: string,rrdatas: optional(list(string)),ttl: optional(number),type: string}))}))

response_policy.description: Defines the response policy this rule applies to, must match an existing response policy in the same project.

rule_name.description: Name of the DNS response policy rule, must be unique within the policy.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for creating, reading, updating, or deleting the DNS response policy rule.
